summary.intent: Hide the CLI agent provider selector UI in the remediation module when the app is running in cloud mode, since the cloud deployment handles agent selection server-side.
summary.outcome: Wrapped the provider selector section and the provider row in the confirmation modal with `{!cloudMode && (...)}` guards in RemediateTab.tsx, committed as `6c8aa66`.

repo: cloudMode is passed as a prop to RemediateTab.tsx — no need to pull from a hook or context.
LocalExecutionWarning was already gated on !cloudMode, establishing the pattern for this change.
The pre-commit hook runs `bun run test` → `bun test src/` plus lint and typecheck via husky at .husky/pre-commit.
tmp/clones/ directories (leftover from evaluations) cause bun to pick up stray test files and produce noisy stderr / non-zero exit codes during pre-commit; cleaning them unblocks the commit.

code.finding: Provider Selector section ('Pick the AI agent to execute the remediation') — wrapped with {!cloudMode && (...)} to hide in cloud mode.
Provider summary row inside the confirmation modal — also wrapped with {!cloudMode && (...)}.

workflow: Bun test discovery can escape the specified directory argument and pick up files in sibling subdirectories (e.g. tmp/clones/) when those directories sit under the project root, causing spurious pre-commit failures.
Cleaning up tmp/clones/ before committing is necessary to get a clean pre-commit run in this repo.

friction: Pre-commit hook failed on first attempt due to bun picking up test files inside tmp/clones/ leftover evaluation directories, producing a non-zero exit code despite all real tests passing.
Indentation in RemediateTab.tsx uses tabs, which required reading the exact file content before the Edit tool would match correctly.
open_items: The tmp/clones/ pollution of bun's test discovery is a pre-existing issue that was only worked around (manual cleanup) rather than fixed — the test script or bun config should exclude tmp/ explicitly.
No automated test covers the cloud-mode conditional rendering of the provider selector; a unit/snapshot test for this branch could be added.
